## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` pass (if Rust code changed)
- [ ] New user-facing strings added to all locale files in `src/i18n/locales/`
- [ ] Screenshots attached (for UI changes)
